title: SQBubliks: Restart 2
description: This is a COMPLETE rebirth of the SQBubliks: Restart project — the world is now filled with dozens of unique bosses, a deep ability system, advanced RPG mechanics, and a fully revamped, living world generation.
body:
![SQBUBLIKS RESTART 2 ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59c215f3c7efbb56ed7b84e18100c7b1d426db70.png)



**SQBubliks: Restart 2** is a COMPLETE rework of SQBubliks: Restart ⚔️
The project received major changes to its design, world generation, optimization, and game version 🌍
The world now features over 10 unique bosses 🐉, along with many other deadly threats ☠️
A huge number of dungeons 🏰 and various RPG mechanics have been added, making survival deeper and more challenging 📜
The progression system has been fully redesigned: abilities are granted at the start of the game, but they come with debuffs ⚖️ — every choice truly matters.

🖥️ Recommended Specifications

- For players:


<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

⚙️ Good CPU

🧠 6 GB of RAM

💾 10 GB of free disk space

</details>



- For server hosting:


<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

⚙️ Good CPU

🧠 4 GB of RAM + 1 GB per player

💾 15–20 GB of disk space (depends on world size)

</details>
